title: Crypto firms face July 1 EU cutoff as MiCA grace period ends
summary: Crypto firms face July 1 EU cutoff as MiCA grace period ends
briefing: The ESMA says crypto companies without MiCA authorization must stop serving EU clients from July 1, even if their licence applications remain under review.

title: Hyperliquid bear turns bullish after losing over $46M shorting HYPE
summary: Hyperliquid bear turns bullish after losing over $46M shorting HYPE
briefing: The whale is now backing Arthur Hayes’ favored HYPE, ZEC and NEAR plays, signaling a sharp pivot toward momentum-led crypto bets.

title: Ethereum drops to 14-week lows: Can ETH price hold $1.8K support?
summary: Ethereum drops to 14-week lows: Can ETH price hold $1.8K support?
briefing: Ethereum price slides to a 14-week low as weakening demand and persistent ETF outflows put the key $1,800 support at risk.

title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
summary: Here’s what happened in crypto today
briefing: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

title: Binance discloses revenue-sharing deal with Alpaca
summary: Binance discloses revenue-sharing deal with Alpaca
briefing: A Binance legal document disclosed a revenue-sharing agreement with Alpaca, which includes sharing 50% of the stock custodian’s order flow revenue with the cryptocurrency exchange.

title: Binance to end NFT support on exchange, shift service to wallet
summary: Binance to end NFT support on exchange, shift service to wallet
briefing: Binance exchange said it will move NFT support from its exchange to its non-custodial wallet and offered users 30 days to migrate their NFTs.

title: Kraken parent Payward brings tokenized IPO access to retail investors
summary: Kraken parent Payward brings tokenized IPO access to retail investors
briefing: Kraken and xStocks Alliance will let eligible users seek allocations in US IPOs at the offering price through tokenized shares in coming weeks.

title: Zcash fixes Orchard bug after emergency network upgrade
summary: Zcash fixes Orchard bug after emergency network upgrade
briefing: Zcash Open Development Lab said the network briefly became unstable as miners upgraded, while the Zcash Foundation said there was no evidence of an exploit.

title: Zcash Completes 'Most Ambitious' Network Upgrade as ZEC Resumes Recent Surge
summary: Zcash Completes 'Most Ambitious' Network Upgrade as ZEC Resumes Recent Surge
briefing: A Zcash vulnerability could have allowed double-spending within the network's flagship privacy pool, though no exploitation occurred.

title: MoonPay Brings Crypto Transactions to Claude and Codex With MoonAgents Desktop App
summary: MoonPay Brings Crypto Transactions to Claude and Codex With MoonAgents Desktop App
briefing: MoonPay's new desktop app connects AI assistants to crypto wallets and blockchain services through a graphical interface.

title: Morning Minute: Bitcoin Falls Below $67k as MSTR Plummets
summary: Morning Minute: Bitcoin Falls Below $67k as MSTR Plummets
briefing: The fallout from Saylor’s first Bitcoin sale in years keeps spreading, while Bernie Sanders and Elizabeth Warren want crypto out of your 401(k).

title: Trezor Reveals Hardware Wallet Vulnerability, But Funds 'Safe'
summary: Trezor Reveals Hardware Wallet Vulnerability, But Funds 'Safe'
briefing: The vulnerability in Trezor's TROPIC01 Secure Element chip was uncovered by an audit carried out by the Ledger Donjon team.

title: George Santos Referred to DOJ, CFTC Over State of the Union Kalshi Trades: Report
summary: George Santos Referred to DOJ, CFTC Over State of the Union Kalshi Trades: Report
briefing: The pardoned ex-congressman allegedly bet against his own State of the Union appearance while publicly hyping it.

title: UK Regulator Warns Soccer Clubs Over Unauthorized Crypto Sponsorship Deals
summary: UK Regulator Warns Soccer Clubs Over Unauthorized Crypto Sponsorship Deals
briefing: The FCA has warned Premier League clubs that partnerships with unlicensed crypto firms could expose fans to unregulated trading platforms.

title: Microsoft Reveals '1,000x More Reliable' Quantum Chip as Bitcoin Threat Draws Nearer
summary: Microsoft Reveals '1,000x More Reliable' Quantum Chip as Bitcoin Threat Draws Nearer
briefing: Microsoft said AI helped speed Majorana 2 development, adding to growing concerns about when quantum computers could threaten Bitcoin's cryptography.

title: Cardsmiths' New America250 Trading Cards Have Real Bitcoin, Dogecoin Up for Grabs
summary: Cardsmiths' New America250 Trading Cards Have Real Bitcoin, Dogecoin Up for Grabs
briefing: Cardsmiths’ latest Currency trading card series tackles American history—and some packs include codes for real Bitcoin, Ethereum, and more.
